name: Urban Sport Grand Baie
shortDescription: Fast access, premium social play, and a compact north-side club rhythm.
description: Grand Baie anchors the Urban Sport circuit with a premium footprint, strong weekday demand, and a season structure that supports both social and competitive play.
highlights: Strong evening and weekend club demand

name: Urban Sport Black River
shortDescription: A larger event footprint built for premium club sessions and sponsor-ready activations.
description: Black River is the broader competition venue in the Urban Sport ecosystem, backed by stronger event visuals, bigger event energy, and the most expansive venue footprint in the source material.
highlights: Best suited for events and tournament staging
